title: QIAGEN HotStarTaq Plus Master Mix PCR
description: QIAGEN HotStarTaq Plus Master Mix (2X): 50 uL hot-start reaction with a shorter 95 C / 5 min activation.

payload.notes: Vendor: QIAGEN, HotStarTaq Plus Master Mix Kit (Cat. 203643). REQUIRED initial activation: 95 C for 5 min (the shorter activation is the key difference from standard HotStarTaq; do not exceed 5 min). Setup here is scaled to 50 uL from QIAGEN's 20 uL handbook table (the 2X master mix gives 1.5 mM MgCl2 and 200 uM each dNTP at 1X). Annealing: ~5 C below the primer Tm, 50-68 C range. The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. Extension 1 min/kb at 72 C. Optional 10X CoralLoad Concentrate adds a gel-loading dye (do not use in capillary sequencers). Source: QIAGEN HotStarTaq Plus PCR Master Mix Kit Quick-Start Protocol and HotStarTaq Plus PCR Handbook (https://www.qiagen.com/HB-0450)
